prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 北京大学医学部在宁夏理科（2025年起为物理类）的最低录取位次呈逐年后移趋势：2023年约91名，2024年约117名，2025年约149名。近两年累计后移约58名，2025年较2024年后移32名，后移幅度有所加大，2025年基准位次约149名；该校在宁夏的招生计划：2023年理科7人，2024年理科7人，2025年物理类9人，2026年（招生计划文件）物理类仍为9人。2025年较2024年扩招2人，但2026年计划与2025年持平，未进一步扩招，竞争压力未因计划增加而缓解。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 北京大学医学部隶属于北京大学，985、211、双一流高校，软科主榜北京大学2026年排名第2位，属全国顶尖层次，对考生吸引力极强，竞争门槛极高；2026年高考周期内北京大学声誉评价为偏负面，主要涉及校园安全、食堂宿舍等舆情，但北京大学医学部作为独立招生代码未直接卷入主要负面事件；抖音热度排名第3（高热），短视频平台曝光量大，报考关注度持续高位。历史投档异常方面，北京大学在2022年、2025年均有投档线相关关注事件，但整体录取热度未受明显冲击；临床医学（A）、口腔医学（A）、基础医学（A）、药学（A+）、护理学（A+）、公共卫生与预防医学（A），医学学科实力全国顶尖，对高分考生有极强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 临床医学、口腔医学等专业持续高热推荐，2024年临床医学推荐、口腔医学推荐（72.31），医学类专业报考热度居高不下；宁夏2026年高考总人数约66000人，较2025年物理类+历史类合计约65897人基本持平，竞争基数未明显扩大；省控线方面，宁夏2025年物理类本科批372分、特殊类型441分，近年省控线波动不大；北京大学医学部位于北京，属一线城市，对宁夏考生有较强地域吸引力；该校在宁夏招生计划仅7-9人，属于极小规模招生，位次波动对计划变化极为敏感。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续后移趋势（91→117→149）、2026年招生计划与2025年持平未扩招、医学类专业报考热度持续高位、学校顶尖层次带来的稳定竞争压力，预计2026年最低录取位次在2025年149名基础上继续小幅后移。预测最低位次约157名，区间138-176名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 口腔医学（本博连读，八年制）
- 临床医学（本博连读，八年制）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 基础医学（本博连读，八年制）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 药学（本硕连读，六年制）
- 预防医学（本硕连读，七年制）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间138-176名以内建议以二档基础医学为主攻方向，一档口腔医学和临床医学作为冲刺目标，三档药学和预防医学作为稳妥保底。位次明显优于区间下限（如130名以内）可重点冲刺一档本博连读专业；位次接近区间上限（如170名以后）建议优先考虑三档本硕连读专业以确保录取。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: The minimum admission ranking of Peking University Health Science Center in Ningxia for science (Physics Category from 2025) has been shifting backward year by year: approximately 91st in 2023, 117th in 2024, and 149th in 2025. Over the past two years, the cumulative backward shift is about 58 places, with a shift of 32 places from 2024 to 2025, indicating an increasing magnitude. The baseline ranking for 2025 is about 149th. The enrollment plan in Ningxia: 7 science students in 2023, 7 science students in 2024, 9 Physics Category students in 2025, and still 9 Physics Category students in 2026 (according to the enrollment plan document). Compared to 2024, there is an expansion of 2 students in 2025, but the 2026 plan remains the same as 2025, with no further expansion, so competitive pressure has not been alleviated by the increase in plan.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Peking University Health Science Center is affiliated with Peking University, a 985, 211, and Double First-Class university. On the Soft Science main ranking, Peking University ranks 2nd in 2026, placing it at the top national level, which strongly attracts candidates and sets a very high competition threshold. During the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, Peking University's reputation evaluation is slightly negative, mainly involving campus safety, cafeteria, and dormitory issues, but Peking University Health Science Center, as an independent admission code, has not been directly involved in major negative events. On Douyin, it ranks 3rd in popularity (high heat), with high exposure on short video platforms and sustained high application attention. Regarding historical admission anomalies, Peking University had attention events related to admission cutoffs in 2022 and 2025, but overall admission heat has not been significantly impacted. Disciplines: Clinical Medicine (A), Stomatology (A), Basic Medicine (A), Pharmacy (A+), Nursing (A+), Public Health and Preventive Medicine (A). The medical discipline strength is top in the country, strongly attracting high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Clinical Medicine and Stomatology continue to be highly recommended. In 2024, Clinical Medicine recommendation and Stomatology recommendation (72.31) indicate sustained high application heat for medical majors. The total number of candidates for the 2026 Gaokao in Ningxia is about 66,000, basically unchanged from the total of about 65,897 for Physics Category plus History Category in 2025, so the competition base has not significantly expanded. Regarding provincial control lines, Ningxia's 2025 Physics Category undergraduate batch is 372 points, special type is 441 points, with little fluctuation in recent years. Peking University Health Science Center is located in Beijing, a first-tier city, which has strong regional appeal to Ningxia candidates. The enrollment plan in Ningxia is only 7-9 students, a very small-scale enrollment, making ranking fluctuations highly sensitive to plan changes.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend of historical rankings (91→117→149), the 2026 enrollment plan unchanged from 2025 with no expansion, the sustained high heat of medical major applications, and the stable competitive pressure from the top-tier school level, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will continue to shift slightly backward from the 2025 ranking of 149. The predicted minimum ranking is about 157, with a range of 138-176.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Stomatology (Bachelor-Master-Doctor Combined, 8-year program)
- Clinical Medicine (Bachelor-Master-Doctor Combined, 8-year program).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)
- Pharmacy (Bachelor-Master Combined, 6-year program)
- Preventive Medicine (Bachelor-Master Combined, 7-year program).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If the ranking is within the predicted range of 138-176, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 Basic Medicine as the main direction, with Tier 1 Stomatology and Clinical Medicine as sprint targets, and Tier 3 Pharmacy and Preventive Medicine as safe backups. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 130), focus on sprinting for Tier 1 Bachelor-Master-Doctor combined programs; if the ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (e.g., after 170), it is recommended to prioritize Tier 3 Bachelor-Master combined programs to ensure admission.
